About VAC Global Solutions

Who We Are

VAC Global Solutions is a next-generation SaaS-driven ERP consulting firm headquartered in Trichy, Tamil Nadu, serving clients across India and globally.

We help SMEs replace fragmented workflows with unified, intelligent ERP platforms — delivering both strategy and implementation in one engagement.

From supply chain automation to HR digitization, we engineer end-to-end operational transformation that delivers measurable ROI within the first 90 days.

Start Your Transformation → View Results
🖥️
Technology-First ERP
We embed enterprise SaaS products directly into consulting engagements — delivering real, lasting operational change without vendor lock-in.
⚙️
Operations & Process Focus
Streamlining supply chain, finance, HR, and production with proven frameworks for measurable efficiency gains.
🌐
Global Reach, Local Expertise
Supporting SMEs across industries with enterprise-grade systems built for the Indian market and beyond.
50+Clients Served
10+Industries
90dDays to ROI
5+SaaS Products
98%Retention
What We Do

Innovating Operations.
Building Results.

Empowering businesses with next-gen ERP solutions from custom implementations to AI-driven platforms.

↗
🏭
01 / ERP
ERP Implementation
Full-cycle ERP deployment across manufacturing, logistics, healthcare — go-live guaranteed within 45 days.
↗
🔗
02 / SAAS
SaaS Integration
Connect your existing tools — CRM, accounting, HR, supply chain — into one unified data ecosystem.
↗
📊
03 / BI
Business Intelligence
Real-time dashboards and automated reporting that give leadership visibility for confident decisions.
↗
⚡
04 / AUTO
Process Automation
Eliminate manual work from procurement, invoicing, inventory, and HR with intelligent automation.
↗
🛡️
05 / COMPLIANCE
Compliance & Audit
HIPAA, GST, and industry-specific compliance built into your systems with automated audit trails.
↗
🎓
06 / SUPPORT
Training & Support
Hands-on staff training, dedicated support, and ongoing optimization to ensure lasting ROI.
Built on Trust

Built on Trust.
Driven by Results.

We don't just implement software — we build relationships.

Years of Tech Expertise
Deep domain knowledge across manufacturing, logistics, healthcare and more.

Transparent Agile Process
Weekly sprints, full visibility, no surprises — just consistent delivery.

Dedicated Full-Stack Teams
ERP consultants, developers and analysts assigned to your project.
24/7
Support & Maintenance

How We Work

From Discovery to
Go-Live in 90 Days

↗
01
🔍
Discovery & Audit
We map your current processes, identify bottlenecks, and define the exact scope of transformation needed.
↗
02
🎨
System Design
We architect a custom ERP blueprint tailored to your industry, team size, and growth roadmap.
↗
03
⚙️
Implementation
Rapid deployment with parallel running to ensure zero disruption to your existing operations.
↗
04
🚀
Go-Live & Scale
Hands-on go-live support, team training, and a 90-day optimization period to guarantee ROI.

Real Impact

Real Impact.
Proven Results.

Explore how we've helped manufacturers and enterprises alike scale and innovate.

01
ERPInventoryManufacturing
Prabhu Textiles
Textile Manufacturing · Coimbatore
⚠ The Challenge
Disconnected Excel sheets across 4 factories causing inventory errors and production delays costing ₹40L/month.
⚡ VAC's Solution
Unified ERP across all factories with real-time inventory tracking, production scheduling and automated purchase orders.
40%Inventory waste cut
₹48LAnnual savings
30dGo-live time
View Full Case Study
02
Digital TransformationLogisticsSaaS
Sri Balaji Logistics
Logistics & Supply Chain · Chennai
⚠ The Challenge
Paper-based dispatch system causing a 72-hour average delivery cycle and zero shipment visibility for clients.
⚡ VAC's Solution
End-to-end digital logistics platform with GPS tracking, automated POD, and customer-facing shipment portal.
3xFaster dispatch
100%Visibility
92%Satisfaction
View Full Case Study →
03
HealthcareComplianceERP
NovaMed Healthcare
Healthcare & Clinics · Bangalore
⚠ The Challenge
Non-compliant patient records management risking regulatory penalties across 3 clinic locations.
⚡ VAC's Solution
HIPAA-aligned healthcare ERP with role-based access, audit trails, and automated compliance reporting.
100%Compliance
0Audit findings
60%Admin time saved
View Full Case Study →
